ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each province */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the province belongs to */,
  "province_population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "province_area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "num_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "increment" INTEGER /* Increment in cases compared to previous day */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the case belongs to */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., confirmed, suspected) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the case */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the hospitalization belongs to */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date the hospitalization occurred */,
  "num_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of patients hospitalized */,
  "hospitalization_reason" TEXT /* Reason for hospitalization */,
  "hospitalization_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of hospitalization in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the vaccination belongs to */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination occurred */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of patients vaccinated */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_dose" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_date" TEXT /* Date the variant was identified */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., Alpha, Beta) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "province_metadata" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the dataset (0-1) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the dataset (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the source belongs to */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., survey, sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_methods_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the result belongs to */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., trend, correlation) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., plot, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the post was published */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was published (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)
